name: python3-titlecase
title: python3-titlecase
summary: changes a given text to Title Caps
description:
changes a given text to Title Caps
This package filter changes a given text to Title Caps, and attempts to be
clever about SMALL words like a/an/the in the input. The list of "SMALL words"
which are not capped comes from the New York Times Manual of Style, plus some
others like 'vs' and 'v'. The filter employs some heuristics to guess
abbreviations that don't need conversion.
.
This is a port of John Gruber's titlecase.pl.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use titlecase because changes a given text to Title Caps.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use titlecase as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `titlecase [options] [args]` as documented upstream for titlecase.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair titlecase with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `titlecase --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
